name: ffa-transcript-db
description: FFA Transcript Database — search transcripts and Teachable course content

scripts.dist: npm run build && mkdir -p _dist && zip -r _dist/ffa-transcript-db-v2.0.0.zip dist/ server/ package.json package-lock.json README.md LICENSE .env.example start.command start.sh start.bat -x '*.DS_Store'
